meta.title: The Great Debate: Anti Virus and Monthly Security Patching Should Be Abandoned In ICS
meta.description:
This is a great throwback episode from S4x12 where about 60 of the pioneers in the industry debate this product. This debate on security patching continues on nearly 10 years later.

And you get to see how S4 has grown and how we have all aged.

FYI  - The video feed is lost for the last 10 minutes and the audio is still worthwhile.
